case_title: WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. VS. AROONRAT CHOTECHUANG

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-02-2021 CONTINUED TO JUN-08-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
